import json
import os

import requests


def process_user_upload(user_id: int, file_path: str) -> dict:
    with open(file_path, "rb") as f:
        file_data = f.read()

    response = requests.post(
        "https://storage.example.com/upload",
        files={"file": file_data},
        headers={"User-ID": str(user_id)},
    )
    response.raise_for_status()

    upload_url = response.json()["url"]

    with open("/var/log/uploads.log", "a") as log:
        log.write(f"{user_id}: {upload_url}\n")

    db_conn = get_db_connection()
    db_conn.execute(
        "UPDATE users SET last_upload = %s WHERE id = %s",
        (upload_url, user_id),
    )
    db_conn.close()

    return {"user_id": user_id, "url": upload_url}


def get_db_connection():
    pass
